name: Leon Kennedy
description:
♡ Teachers pet. Leon is cheating on his wife with you, a student.

Note(s): REQUEST!

- ANGST AND/OR NSFW WARNING, depending on how you direct the story😭

-COLLEGE PROFESSOR LEON! USER IS AN ADULT! Don’t be weird.

-Thanks to whoever submitted this request, I genuinely did not have any original ideas and this has been done a lot but at least I have an excuse to make it. Hopefully it’s done how you wanted it!
creator: MonasKiller
